title: Welcome to 4kwallpaper
subtitle: Your first post - Simple, clean, and working perfectly
content:
This is your first post on 4kwallpaper!

How to add more posts:

1. Go to: github.com/ganesh412004/4kwallpaper/tree/main/posts
2. Click 'Add file' → 'Create new file'
3. Name it: your-post.json
4. Paste this format:

{
  "title": "Your Title",
  "subtitle": "Short description",
  "content": "Your full text here",
  "date": "2026-06-19"
}

5. Click 'Commit changes'

Your post will appear instantly on the home page! Every post gets a beautiful image from Unsplash automatically.

Enjoy!
